enemy_sprites.name: Demons
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: interactive with emotional states (anger, fear, joy, interest)

descriptors: angled third-person view for standard environments
first-person view for dungeons and buildings
distinctive_elements: lunar phase display in top right corner showing in-game time passage
enemy demons with personality-based interaction mechanics

note: Wikipedia source contains gameplay mechanics and development credits (character designer Kazuma Kaneko, artists Masahisa Watanabe, Shigenori Soejima) but lacks specific visual asset dimensions, color palette specifications, and animation frame counts. Original platform was PlayStation (1996), not SNES.
